_meta.item_philosophy: Nothing is bought from a shop. Everything is scavenged, dropped, crafted, given, or found. This is persecution.

consumables.name: Rice Ball
consumables.description: A simple onigiri wrapped in a leaf. Cold, dense, sustaining.

consumables.name: Rice Cake
consumables.description: Pressed mochi. Obaa-chan made these every New Year.

consumables.name: Soldier's Ration
consumables.description: Dried rice, salt fish, pickled plum. Standard garrison issue. Tastes like duty.

consumables.name: Medicinal Herb
consumables.description: Wild herbs from the mountain. Obaa-chan knew every plant by name.

consumables.name: Herbal Poultice
consumables.description: Medicinal herbs bound in cloth. Obaa-chan's recipe.

consumables.name: Mountain Ginseng
consumables.description: A gnarled root from deep mountain shade. Bitter, powerful. Restores body and spirit.

consumables.name: Antidote Herb
consumables.description: A bitter root that neutralizes mamushi venom. Chew and swallow.

consumables.name: Smelling Salts
consumables.description: Sharp mineral salts. One sniff and the fog clears.

consumables.name: Camphor Oil
consumables.description: Distilled from camphor laurel. Sharp, clarifying. Sharpens senses for battle.

consumables.name: Incense Stick
consumables.description: Sandalwood incense from Father Tomas's supplies. Deepens prayer.

consumables.name: Smoke Pot
consumables.description: A clay pot of burning powder. Crack it and run.

consumables.name: River Stone
consumables.description: A smooth stone from the river. David killed Goliath with one. You're no David.

sacramentals.name: Holy Water
sacramentals.description: Blessed water from Father Tomas. Purifies and restores spirit. Can bless equipment.

sacramentals.name: Sacred Chrism
sacramentals.description: Oil mixed with balsam, consecrated by a bishop. In all of hidden Japan, this may be the last vial.

sacramentals.name: Blessed Candle
sacramentals.description: Beeswax candle blessed at Candlemas. Its light reveals hidden things and repels shadow.

sacramentals.name: Prayer Beads
sacramentals.description: Wooden beads worn smooth by decades of Hail Marys. Not a rosary — too dangerous to carry openly.

sacramentals.name: Blessed Salt
sacramentals.description: Salt blessed by a priest. Purifies places and wards evil.

weapons.name: Farmer's Sickle
weapons.description: A rice-harvesting sickle. Not a weapon. But it has an edge.

weapons.name: Pilgrim's Blade
weapons.description: Given by the Messenger. Its story is not yet written. It hums faintly during prayer.

weapons.name: Bamboo Staff
weapons.description: A length of hardened bamboo. Walking stick, weapon, and prayer focus.

weapons.name: Soldier's Yari
weapons.description: An ashigaru's spear. Functional, impersonal, made for a hand that follows orders.

weapons.name: Cross Dagger
weapons.description: A dagger with a cross-shaped guard. Hidden in the chapel altar stone. Deals holy damage.

weapons.name: Mori's Naginata
weapons.description: Commander Mori's polearm. Carrying it feels wrong — or right, depending on who you've become.
weapons.moral_weight: The Accuser will comment on this.

garments.name: Farmer's Kosode
garments.description: Plain cotton, patched and re-patched. It smells like earth and rice straw. Home.

garments.name: Traveler's Kimono
garments.description: Sturdy traveling kimono in dark indigo. Blends with shadows.

garments.name: Padded Jacket
garments.description: Quilted cotton over a stiff core. Not real armor, but it turns a blade.

garments.name: Priest's Cassock
garments.description: Father Tomas's cassock. Wearing it marks you as clergy — both shield and target.

garments.name: Soldier's Dō
garments.description: Light chest armor from a fallen soldier. The daimyo's crest. Protection at what cost?
garments.moral_weight: Negative SPR: spiritual cost of wearing the persecutor's armor.

garments.name: Pilgrim's Cloak
garments.description: Rough-woven cloak with a deep hood. Hides your face, blocks rain.

headgear.name: Sedge Hat
headgear.description: Wide-brimmed farmer's hat. Keeps the sun off and the face hidden.

headgear.name: Monk's Hood
headgear.description: Deep hood on shoulder cloth. A Christian wearing one is hiding in plain sight.

headgear.name: Iron Hachimaki
headgear.description: Reinforced headband with thin iron plate.

headgear.name: Prayer Veil
headgear.description: Thin linen veil used during hidden Mass. Restores 1 MP per turn.

accessories.name: Straw Sandals
accessories.description: Woven waraji. Light on the feet. Every pilgrim makes their own.

accessories.name: Iron Wrist Guard
accessories.description: Leather bracer reinforced with iron. Protects the forearm.

accessories.name: Traveler's Pouch
accessories.description: Leather pouch on the belt. Carry more.

accessories.name: Mother's Ring
accessories.description: Simple copper ring found in the chapel ashes. It's warm.

accessories.name: Fox's Charm
accessories.description: Carved fox on leather cord. You run faster with it.

relics.name: Obaa-chan's Cross
relics.description: Small wooden cross from camphor wood. Grows warm near hidden Christian artifacts.

materials.name: Wolf Pelt
materials.description: Thick grey fur. Ichiro can work it into a padded jacket.

materials.name: Iron Scraps
materials.description: Bent nails, broken fittings. A craftsman could use these.

materials.name: Fine Cloth
materials.description: Well-woven cotton. Rare in a village this poor.

materials.name: Camphor Wood
materials.description: Fragrant wood sacred to the Kakure. A craftsman could make something holy.

materials.name: Chapel Ash
materials.description: Ash from the burned chapel, gathered reverently. The ash remembers.

key_items.name: Mori's Seal
key_items.description: Commander Mori's personal seal. A document could be forged. A gate opened. A prisoner freed.

key_items.name: Mark of Endurance
key_items.description: Not physical. A change in the soul. Quiet certainty after enduring the Accuser without a wound.

key_items.name: Breviary Page
key_items.description: From Father Tomas's breviary. Portuguese: 'Send them another. Send them a saint.'

key_items.name: Miko's Flower
key_items.description: Small purple wildflower with a bent stem. It seems like nothing. Keep it anyway.

key_items.name: Fumi-e Fragment
key_items.description: Broken piece of the brass fumi-e. You broke it instead of stepping on it.

lore_items.name: Kakure Prayer Scroll
lore_items.description: The Orasho — garbled Latin prayers passed down in Japanese for generations. The faith burns clear.

lore_items.name: Father Tomas's Journal
lore_items.description: Water-stained Portuguese and Latin. 'Am I a shepherd or a fool?'

lore_items.name: Soldier's Unsent Letter
lore_items.description: 'Mother — they pray as they burn. I can't sleep.'
